arts.ttl: Man City reaches Women's Champions League quarterfinals. Bayern settles for draw in Norway
arts.sum: Khadija Shaw scored twice and Manchester City advanced to the Women’s Champions League quarterfinals with a 2-1 win at Swedish club Hammarby on Thursday. City leads Group D with 12 points, six more than two-time defending champion Barcelona, which was facing Austrian club St. Pölten later Thursday.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 19: Joshua Kimmich might school Bayern Munich in his talks; Leroy Sané’s future is up in the air; Leon Goretzka to start?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich’s midfield is banged up, Leon Goretzka might start, and some people are not going to like it. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany wary of FC Augsburg amid injuries, won’t commit to start for Thomas Müller
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany knows that his team has been on very nice winning run, but understands that FC Augsburg will be yet another test in the Bundesliga — without several of his key players. It’s always unfortunate when players go to the national team and come back injured.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich to be set back €80 million for Lille striker Jonathan David
arts.sum: Bayern Munich do like a high value, high profile striker and after entering the fray for in-form Sporting Club striker Viktor Gyökeres, it looks like the club has their sights set on Lille forward Jonathan David. Looking for some talk on the prospect of Bayern Munich teaming up Florian Wirtz and Jamal Musiala?

arts.ttl: Kickoff! Vålerenga vs. Bayern Munich: Live blog, match thread, how to watch
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is a perfect three-for-three so far in the UEFA Women’s Champions League with wins against each of the other teams in the group: first Arsenal FC, then Juventus, and most recently Vålerenga. Arsenal sits only three points behind Bayern and emphatically smashed Juventus on the last matchday, so the Bavarians will need to stay at their best — especially with a second match against the Gunners looming.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Augsburg: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: While you’re here, check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show for Bayern Munich vs. Tarek Buchmann trained with the team the day before that and so did Pavlović, but the latter definitely won’t be rushed back.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer not 100% certain to start Bayern Munich’s game vs Augsburg
arts.sum: At his pre-match press conference ahead of Bayern Munich’s game vs Augsburg, head coach Vincent Kompany gave an update on Bayern’s goalkeeping situation. Earlier in the week, Manuel Neuer cut…

arts.ttl: Injuries forcing Bayern Munich to innovate before tough games ahead
arts.sum: João Palhinha was injured while on duty with Portugal, likely ruling the midfielder out for the rest of the year, and goalkeeper Manuel Neuer is doubtful for Augsburg’s visit in the Bundesliga on Friday because of a rib injury. Bayern coach Vincent Kompany said on Thursday that Neuer felt a “stabbing pain,” the reason the 38-year-old goalkeeper was unable to finish Wednesday’s training session.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey: “Ligue 1 is tougher than the Bundesliga”
arts.sum: In an exclusive interview with Foot Mercato, Bayern Munich full-back Sacha Boey compares the Bundesliga with Ligue 1, French connections at FCB, and Vincent Kompany. It’s been almost one year…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. FC Augsburg: 2024/25 Bundesliga full coverage
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will host FC Augsburg on the new turf at the Allianz Arena in a match that should be very winnable for the home side. While you’re here, check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show for Bayern Munich vs.
